title: QSMP - GEGG is everywhere
description: A texture pack to see life in gegg.
body:
# " GEGG IS LOVE, GEGG IS LIFE ! "
 

This texture pack is available in 3 different versions, and each version is available for MinecraftVanilla and Mincecraft moded
# 


        


### 
### 
### 


Normal edition:

This version changes every QSMP texture to one with a Gegg on it. This means that all blocks, objects and mobs have a Gegg imprint.

- The texture pack for QSMP mods can be downloaded from Modrinth here:   [downloads-normal-edition-mods](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/22wiajPf/versions/yxEblvjL/QSMP-%20Gegg%20Texture%20Pack%20%28Normal%20edition%29.zip)

- The texture  pack  for  Vanilla  can  be  downloaded  from  Modrinth  here:   downloads-[normal-edition-vanilla](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/22wiajPf/versions/wISuECQG/Vanilla%20-%20Gegg%20Texture%20Pack%20%28Normal%20edition%29.zip)

 ![normal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ebe6e10445a8f70ef15222d89f294edcc1d77a83.webp)


 

 
Minimalist edition:

This version replaces all QSMP particles with a Gegg. This version can be used every time and does not change the appearance of the game.

- The texture pack for QSMP mods can be downloaded from Modrinth here:   [downloads-Minimalist-edition-mods](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/22wiajPf/versions/Ejdgrquf/QSMP-Gegg%20Texture%20Pack%20%28Minimalist%20edition%29.zip)

- The texture  pack  for  Vanilla  can  be  downloaded  from  Modrinth  here:   [downloads-Minimalist-edition-vanilla](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/22wiajPf/versions/AygJrdIF/Vanilla-Gegg%20Texture%20Pack%20%28Minimalist%20edition%29.zip)

 ![minimaliste](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f410daab43eab12a42ebeba7be5e221a2ea63061.webp)



 


Fanatic Edition:

This version replaces every QSMP texture with a custom Gegg texture. That is, all blocks, objects and mobs have been replaced by Gegg.

- The texture pack for QSMP mods can be downloaded from Modrinth here:   [downloads-Fanatic-edition-mods](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/22wiajPf/versions/M0q4bIQ9/QSMP-%20GeggTexture%20Pack%20%28Fanatic%20edition%29.zip)

- The texture  pack  for  Vanilla  can  be  downloaded  from  Modrinth  here:   [downloads-Fanatic-edition-vanilla](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/22wiajPf/versions/60m01zSW/Vanilla-%20GeggTexture%20Pack%20%28Fanatic%20edition%29.zip)
       
 ![fanatic](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b76550562918485efa0538560365763c3185cdfd.webp)


# 
Loading the texture might take some times depending of your computer

This project is not related to QSMP or Quackity.
If you have any problems with the texture packs, please let me know and I'll do my best to help.
If you have any suggestions for modifying this pack or for creating a new pack like this one, please let me know.
